title: Mediterranean Beef Tacos
description: This Mediterranean Beef Tacos recipe combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the simplicity of tacos. Beef is marinated in a mixture of Mediterranean spices and then sautéed to perfection.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
2. Once the beef is browned, add the Mediterranean Spice Blend and stir to combine.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, toast the taco shells by baking them in the oven at 350°F for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. In a small bowl, mix together the jelly and crushed glassy olives.
6. To assemble the tacos, place a portion of the beef mixture onto each taco shell, followed by a spoonful of the jelly-olive mixture.
7. Top with shredded cheese, sliced beef, lettuce, tomato, and cucumber.
